description: Looks up tyres, optional equipment, noise levels, and type-approval flags for one exact Danish registration number. Use when a user asks about a specific car's equipment, options, tyres/rims, noise readings, NCAP testing, or particle filter status.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-cars-flat | WHERE plate == ?registration_number | KEEP plate, brand, model, variant, tyres_rims, other_equipment, standing_noise_db, driving_noise_db, standing_noise_rpm, particle_filter, ncap_tested, taxi_suitable | LIMIT 5

registration_number.description: Exact Danish registration number, for example EN44360
